untranslatable_reason: Critical parameters are AUTHOR_SILENT: exact deviation threshold, mean reversion signal definition, lookback period, half-life, and backtest period are not specified. The original excerpt provides only index references without actual strategy implementation details. Used Z-score as a reasonable proxy for mean reversion detection, but precise entry/exit thresholds and mean definition cannot be determined from provided source text.
translation_notes: Signal describes a generic mean-reversion framework without specific implementation details. Substituted zscore_20 as a standard mean-reversion indicator (negative Z-score = below mean, positive = above mean). Entry conditions assume deviation threshold of ±1 standard deviation and exit on mean reversion (Z-score crossing zero). Actual strategy requires access to the backtested implementation parameters referenced but not provided in the source excerpt.
